name: Sahu Cdkn2a-OSK aged-cell targeted partial reprogramming study
summary: Mouse and human-cell study of AAV OSK under a Cdkn2a promoter intended to target aged or stressed cells, including progeroid and naturally aged mouse lifespan, health-marker, tumor-incidence, wound-healing, and human fibroblast gene-expression readouts.
model_system: Progeroid and naturally aged wild-type mice, plus aging or stressed human primary fibroblasts
